creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
Output from Konsole:

Unable to load library icui18n "Cannot load library icui18n: (Shared object "icui18n" not found, required by "konsole")" 
QDBusConnection: session D-Bus connection created before QCoreApplication. Application may misbehave.
QDBusConnection: session D-Bus connection created before QCoreApplication. Application may misbehave.

Then i close it:

X Error: BadWindow (invalid Window parameter) 3
  Major opcode: 20 (X_GetProperty)
  Resource id:  0x2a0001b

Similar error with Dolphin:

 Unable to load library icui18n "Cannot load library icui18n: (Shared object "icui18n" not found, required by "dolphin")" 
dolphin(26592) KSambaSharePrivate::findSmbConf: KSambaShare: Could not find smb.conf! 
dolphin(26592)/kdecore (KConfigSkeleton) KCoreConfigSkeleton::writeConfig:
dolphin(26592)/kdecore (KConfigSkeleton) KCoreConfigSkeleton::writeConfig:
dolphin(26592)/kdecore (KConfigSkeleton) KCoreConfigSkeleton::writeConfig:
dolphin(26592)/kdecore (KConfigSkeleton) KCoreConfigSkeleton::writeConfig:
